blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or focus issues.
blur_detection.recommendation: Re-capture the image with a steadier hand or use a tripod to ensure sharpness.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure even lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the document.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the upper-right corner, slightly affecting readability.
glare_identification.recommendation: Adjust the angle of the camera to minimize reflections.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds are detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections are detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions are detected on the document.

classification.error_type: File identified not as an expense
classification.error_message: The document does not contain sufficient fields to be classified as an expense.
classification.reasoning: The document contains some numerical values and what appears to be phone numbers, but it lacks critical fields such as supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description/line items. Therefore, it does not meet the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document lacks the necessary fields to be identified as an expense document. Only numerical values and possible phone numbers were detected, but no clear expense-related information was found.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt contains multiple compliance violations including missing mandatory fields such as supplier name, supplier address, supplier VAT number, supplier phone, supplier email, supplier website, customer name, customer address, invoice number, receipt number, date of issue, and item description. These issues need to be addressed with the supplier or provider to ensure compliance with the required standards.
